title: taraxacum elongatihastatum
intro: Taraxacum elongatihastatum, also known as the elongated-leaved dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its elongated leaves and distinctive flower heads. The plant contains bioactive compounds like sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Taraxacum elongatihastatum include its potential to support liver health, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Taraxacum elongatihastatum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide various health benefits.
